name: SCP Foundation
description:
THE SCP FOUNDATION.

The Foundation where every worst fears of Humanity are locked up in.

You're a SCP in this severe and strict watched foundation...

You can be any kind of character from any univers/fandom ! Like a character from an anime, comic, movie, show etc... Or from another kind of fandom like video games or just concept like Creepypastas, Countryhumans etc...
Yeh ik it's dumb but I was boring so why not. ;]

Don't hesitate to put reviews! :3

Btw, for people who used "SCP Foundation" bot from Qlq.... (Can't remember the username help-)

It's me :(

I was just tired of my username so I preferred deleting my account, I'm really sorry for people who loved this bot and were having much chats on it.

PLS GUYS DON'T BULLY ME, IT'S AS ANNOYING FOR ME AS FOR YOU 😭

sigh... I'm still hoping you guys will still have fun with my bot, kiss!
creator: petit.cygne
